title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: The Next Big Score
content: Perched on the hills of Pacific Bluffs, the world-famous Kortz Center looms large over the Los Santos cultural scene. Priceless international works of art have adorned its hallways for years, and now the time has come to raid this prestigious gallery’s esteemed collection for personal gain in The Kortz Center Heist, this summer's exciting new update coming to GTA Online in July.
